figures.caption: Figure 2: Game flow in The Resistance: Avalon. Each mission round consists of four phases: (1) Discussion, where players share observations and suspicions; (2) Team Proposal, where the current leader selects team members; (3) Voting, where all players approve or reject the proposal; and (4) Mission Execution, where approved team members secretly choose success or fail. The cycle repeats until one team wins three missions.
Figure 3: Game viewer interface showing a 5-player game during Mission 3’s proposal phase.
